channel.title: Opening Day on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Opening Day on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Seattle Mariners Opening Day 2026: Everything You Need to Be Ready
item.description: Opening Day is Thursday, March 26. Here's everything you need — tickets, gear, how to watch, and key games to mark on your calendar for the Mariners' 50th anniversary season.
